summary: Replace `if len(args) == 0 { return cmd.Help() }` with usageErr; add rejectUnknownSubcommand RunE on parent commands.
reason: Two related issues: (1) cmd.Help() returns nil so missing positional args silently exited rc=0 in 51 generated commands; (2) parent commands without Run/RunE are non-Runnable in cobra v1.9.1, so `videos garbage` returned flag.ErrHelp (rc=0) before Args validation could run. Fix: make parents Runnable with a RunE that errors on unknown subcommand.
validated_outcome: playlists update --name x (missing <id>) exits rc=2; videos garbage exits rc=3 with 'unknown command'; bare parent (videos with no subcommand) still exits rc=0 with help; valid subcommands still dispatch.
